response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software engineer with web, mobile, and some embedded background, but the role requires deep expertise in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, performance architecture, and hardware-software co-design. The resume shows no experience with GPU architecture, deep neural network optimization, SIMD/MIMD design, or silicon-level performance analysis. Educational background (BS CS) without the specialized hardware experience does not meet the Principal-level bar for this role.
strengths: Long software engineering tenure with low-latency systems experience at Dunnhumby
Some embedded and hardware-adjacent exposure (National Instruments LabWindows/CVI, robotic arms)
Strong polyglot skills including C/C++ and DLang for performance-oriented work
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator, or GPU architecture experience
No deep-learning workload or DNN training/inference optimization background
Education and experience profile does not match Principal hardware architect requirements

key_factors.factor: Missing AI accelerator / SoC modeling expertise
No GPU architecture or DNN optimization background
Performance engineering experience with low-latency systems
